notes: No external data fetches, real public records, or app-visible generated public data are active.

sources.name: CMS hospital/provider data
sources.expectedUse: Future hospital facility records and selected source-supported attributes.
sources.allowedUse: Planning, orientation, quality improvement, and public-data situational awareness.
sources.notAllowedUse: Live routing, diversion, bed availability, dispatch, triage, transfer decisions, or clinical decision support.
sources.plannedRefreshCadence: To be determined during source-specific ingestion patch.
limitations: Future ingestion must validate source fields, dates, and limitations before display.
